epigraph.quote: We slept with the skylight open + the rain didn't come in - v. pleasant.

per_stop.quote: Mediaeval parts well-attuned to each other in the present Minster.
We had a super day, chatting & admired their garden & an hour's walk.
Amazing, well-built dry-stone wall up drive Ash dale.
32 men slept in one room. They died in their 40s of "black spit."
an absolutely beautiful woodland path which took us back down to the van.
Most fascinating are the 350 letters left over from the leaving bonfire.
